summary: Added atmospheric depth cues across all four geometry systems. Vertex shaders pass camera-space depth via vDepth varying and apply exponential atmospheric decay (rate 0.08) to point size beyond uFogNear. Fragment shaders compute smoothstep fog between uFogNear (3.0) and uFogFar (8.0), applying alpha attenuation capped at 85% (far points ghost but never vanish) and subtle color desaturation with cool shift (50% mix toward luminance-based blue-grey tint). All fog uniforms registered in COMMON_UNIFORMS and ShaderMaterial instances. 101 new tests pass, all 1039 existing tests pass, build succeeds.
